hero.subtitle: Family-owned and driven by quality. We treat every home like our own — with care, precision, and the kind of clean you'll notice.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Family-Owned. Quality-Driven.
about.p1: Havana Cleaning was founded by a family who believes every home deserves to feel spotless. We bring care, pride, and attention to detail to every job.
about.p2: We're not just a cleaning company. We're a family business built on trust, hard work, and the belief that a clean home is the foundation of a happy life.
about.p3: From Florida neighborhoods to homes across the country — we bring the same level of care and professionalism to every job. Our team is background-checked and trained to deliver results you'll love.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Experience the Havana Difference?
about.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of happy families who trust us with their homes.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.customCleanDesc: Tell us what you need and we'll create a plan just for you.
services.bookOnline: Book online in minutes. Pick your time and we handle the rest.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Priced by your home size — choose the plan that fits.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Prices vary by home size, service type, and add-ons. Florida sales tax (7%) applies.
pricing.addOnsSubtitle: Customize your clean with these popular extras.
pricing.saveRecurring: Save Up to 20% with a Recurring Plan
pricing.saveRecurringDesc: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — pick a schedule and save on every clean.

careers.heroSubtitle: We're growing our family of professional cleaners. Competitive pay, flexible schedule, and a team that treats you right.

handyman.label: Handyman Services
handyman.homeSubtitle: From leaky faucets to furniture assembly — our handyman team handles repairs and installations across New York City.
handyman.heroSubtitle: Havana Cleaning now offers professional handyman services across all five NYC boroughs. No job too small.
handyman.servicesSubtitle: From quick fixes to full installations — we handle it all with care and precision.
handyman.minorRepairsDesc: Leaky faucets, drywall patches, caulking tubs and showers — the small fixes that make a big difference.
handyman.furnitureAssemblyDesc: IKEA, Amazon, Wayfair — we assemble it all so you don't have to.
handyman.tvShelfMountingDesc: Wall-mount your TV, install floating shelves, and hang pictures with precision.
handyman.doorWindowFixesDesc: Squeaky hinges, stuck locks, and weatherstripping — we get them working smoothly again.
handyman.lightFixtureInstallDesc: Swap bulbs, install ceiling fans, and upgrade light fixtures safely and cleanly.
handyman.groutTileRepairDesc: Re-caulking, grout restoration, and cracked tile replacement to refresh your surfaces.
handyman.paintingTouchUpsDesc: Scuff marks, baseboards, accent walls — a fresh coat where you need it most.
handyman.gutterCleaningDesc: Clear debris and keep water flowing properly. Cleaning is what we do best.
handyman.pressureWashingDesc: Driveways, patios, fences, and building exteriors — power-washed to look brand new.
handyman.smartHomeSetupDesc: Thermostat, doorbell cameras, smart locks — installed and configured for you.
handyman.deckFenceRepairDesc: Loose boards, broken slats, wobbly railings — we restore and reinforce.
handyman.closetShelvingDesc: Custom shelving, closet organizers, and storage solutions installed to maximize your space.
handyman.step1Desc: Fill out our quick form with details about what you need done.
handyman.step2Desc: We'll review your request and send you an upfront quote within 24 hours.
handyman.step3Desc: Our handyman arrives on time, gets the job done right, and cleans up after.
handyman.nycAreasTitle: Serving All of New York City
handyman.nycAreasSubtitle: Available across all five boroughs and surrounding neighborhoods.
handyman.formSubtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
handyman.faq1a: We serve all five NYC boroughs — Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, and Staten Island — plus surrounding neighborhoods.
handyman.faq2q: How much do handyman services cost?
handyman.faq2a: Pricing varies by project. We provide free, upfront quotes so you know exactly what to expect before we start. No hidden fees.
handyman.faq3q: Do I need to provide tools or materials?
handyman.faq3a: No — our handyman comes fully equipped with professional tools. If your project requires specific materials (tiles, paint, fixtures), we can pick them up or coordinate with you beforehand.
handyman.faq4q: How quickly can you schedule a visit?
handyman.faq4a: We offer same-day and next-day availability depending on the project. Fill out our quote form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
handyman.faq5q: Is your handyman licensed and insured?
handyman.faq5a: Yes. Our handyman is fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We stand behind every job we do.
handyman.faq6q: Can I book recurring handyman services?
handyman.faq6a: Absolutely. Many property managers and homeowners schedule regular maintenance visits. Contact us to set up a recurring plan.
handyman.ctaReadySubtitle: Professional handyman services across NYC. Request your free quote today.
